## Redirection interface

A redirection (AKA Direct Link) is simply a URL. Normally, the user is just redirected to it after making a query that matches the configuration of this URL. In other cases it is shown as a button that the user can click, and which will trigger the redirect action.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface Redirection extends NamedModel<'Redirection'>, Identifiable, Taggable 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [NamedModel](./x-types.namedmodel.md)<!-- -->&lt;'Redirection'&gt;, [Identifiable](./x-types.identifiable.md)<!-- -->, [Taggable](./x-types.taggable.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [url](./x-types.redirection.url.md) | string | URL to redirect. |
